title: Pre-Ecolier Practice Set 15 — Mixed Review
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official competition questions.

questions.question_text: How many apples are in the basket?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='40' width='180' height='50' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='30' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='55' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='80' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='105' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='130' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='155' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='180' cy='55' r='8' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.solution: Count each apple: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7. There are 7 apples.

questions.question_text: What is 6 + 7?
Which shape has exactly 4 equal sides and 4 right angles?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 250 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='5' y='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='55' y='15' width='50' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='130,10 150,50 110,50' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='180' cy='30' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='220,10 240,30 220,50 200,30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Five shapes shown in a row: a square, a rectangle, a triangle, a circle, and a rhombus.
questions.solution: A square has 4 equal sides and 4 right angles.

questions.question_text: What is 15 - 8?
What comes next in the pattern: square, circle, square, circle, square, ___?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 250 40' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='5' y='5' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='60' cy='20' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='85' y='5' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='140' cy='20' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='165' y='5' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='220' y='27' font-size='24' fill='currentColor'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Alternating pattern of square, circle, square, circle, square, then a question mark.
questions.solution: The pattern alternates square and circle. After square comes circle.

questions.question_text: The clock shows what time?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='45' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='45' y='18' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>12</text><text x='85' y='53' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>3</text><text x='47' y='92' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>6</text><text x='10' y='53' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>9</text><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='50' y2='25' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='75' y2='50' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Analog clock with hour hand on 12 and minute hand on 3.
questions.solution: Hour hand at 12, minute hand at 3 means 12:15.

questions.question_text: Tom has 3 coins of 5 cents each. How many cents does he have in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 150 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='25' cy='25' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='15' y='29' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>5c</text><circle cx='75' cy='25' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='65' y='29' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>5c</text><circle cx='125' cy='25' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='115' y='29' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>5c</text></svg>

questions.question_text: How many blocks are shown below?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='5' y='5' width='20' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='30' y='5' width='20' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='55' y='5' width='20' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='80' y='5' width='20' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='5' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='20' height='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Six square blocks: 4 on the top row and 2 on the bottom row.
questions.solution: 4 blocks on top + 2 blocks on bottom = 6 blocks.

questions.question_text: Mia had 12 pencils. She gave 4 to her friend. How many pencils does she have now?
What number comes next? 1, 3, 5, 7, ___
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 40' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='25' font-size='18' fill='currentColor'>1</text><text x='50' y='25' font-size='18' fill='currentColor'>3</text><text x='90' y='25' font-size='18' fill='currentColor'>5</text><text x='130' y='25' font-size='18' fill='currentColor'>7</text><text x='170' y='25' font-size='18' fill='currentColor'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: The sequence 1, 3, 5, 7, ? shown on a line.

questions.question_text: How many total squares can you see in the figure (small and large combined)?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='10' width='80' height='80' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='50' y1='10' x2='50' y2='90' stroke='currentColor'/><line x1='10' y1='50' x2='90' y2='50' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A large square divided into 4 equal smaller squares.

questions.question_text: What is 9 + 4 + 3?
Lisa has more marbles than Ken. Ken has more marbles than Paul. Who has the fewest marbles?
questions.solution: Lisa > Ken > Paul, so Paul has the fewest.

questions.question_text: A toy costs 18 cents. Ben has a 10-cent coin and a 5-cent coin. How many more cents does he need?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='25' cy='25' r='20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='13' y='29' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>10c</text><circle cx='80' cy='25' r='18' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='70' y='29' font-size='12' fill='currentColor'>5c</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Two coins: one 10-cent coin and one 5-cent coin.

questions.question_text: How many dots are shown in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 140 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='15' cy='15' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='35' cy='15' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='55' cy='15' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='75' cy='15' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='95' cy='15' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='15' cy='40' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='35' cy='40' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='55' cy='40' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='75' cy='40' r='5' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Two rows: 5 dots on top and 4 dots on bottom.

questions.question_text: If it is 9 o'clock now, what time will it be in 4 hours?
There are 5 birds on a branch. Two fly away, then 3 more join. How many birds are on the branch now?
Which figure is made of exactly 3 triangles joined together?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 70' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='15' y='68' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>A</text><polygon points='10,60 30,20 50,60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='50,60 30,20 70,20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><text x='105' y='68' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>B</text><g transform='translate(85,0)'><polygon points='10,60 25,20 40,60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='40,60 25,20 55,20' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><polygon points='55,20 40,60 70,60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></g><text x='195' y='68' font-size='10' fill='currentColor'>C</text><g transform='translate(175,0)'><polygon points='10,60 40,10 70,60' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Figure A is 2 triangles, Figure B is 3 triangles joined, Figure C is 1 triangle.
questions.solution: Figure B is made of 3 triangles joined.

questions.question_text: A box holds 4 crayons. How many crayons are in 4 boxes?
Complete the pattern: 20, 17, 14, 11, ___
A number plus 7 equals 16. What is the number?
Kim arranged 20 beads into 4 equal groups. How many beads are in each group?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'><circle cx='10' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='22' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='34' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='46' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='58' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='80' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='92' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='104' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='116' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='128' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='150' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='162' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='174' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='186' cy='30' r='4'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Several small beads grouped in a row to suggest equal groups.

questions.question_text: Amy buys a pencil for 8 cents and an eraser for 6 cents. She pays with 20 cents. How much change does she get?
How many small cubes make up the stack shown?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'><rect x='20' y='80' width='25' height='25'/><rect x='45' y='80' width='25' height='25'/><rect x='70' y='80' width='25' height='25'/><rect x='20' y='55' width='25' height='25'/><rect x='45' y='55' width='25' height='25'/><rect x='20' y='30' width='25' height='25'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Stack of cubes: 3 on the bottom row, 2 in the middle, 1 on top.
